hero.title: Premium visibility for visa professionals.
hero.subtitle: Give applicants a trusted place to discover your expertise, verify your credentials, and book a consultation with confidence.
why.title: Turn trust into revenue — not just visibility.
why.p1: Verified profiles make your agency look professional before the first enquiry lands.
why.p2: Featured placement helps serious applicants find you faster when their route is urgent.
why.p3: The platform gives you a serious business workspace instead of a cluttered listing page.
why.p4: White-label options let you grow beyond one agency into a branded service model.
marketplace.title: Browse verified agents or manage your profile.
marketplace.subtitle: Applicants can find trusted professionals, while agent partners can maintain their listing and conversion workflow from the same hub.
signin.title: Sign In to Browse Agents
signin.subtitle: Sign in with Google or your email to view verified agents, send contact requests, or list your own agency.
card.toast_failed: Failed to send enquiry. Please try again.
inner.empty_body: Be the first to register as a verified VisaClear agent.
inner.agent_cta.title: Are you a visa agent?
inner.agent_cta.body: Register your profile to connect with applicants searching VisaClear for visa help. Get verified to display a trust badge.
profile.live_body: Applicants can now find and contact you.
profile.pending_body: Our team will review your profile within 2–3 business days.
form.title: Register as a Visa Agent
form.subtitle: Your profile will be reviewed and verified by the VisaClear team before going live.
form.name: Full Name *
form.bio_placeholder: Tell applicants about your expertise and success rate…
form.toast_success: Your agent profile has been submitted for verification!
form.toast_required: Please fill in all required fields
register.h1: A more trusted way to present your agency.
register.subtitle: Create a verified partner profile, choose a paid visibility tier, and turn serious applicant demand into a cleaner agency pipeline.
register.feature2: Clear business details and service areas
register.feature3: Built for applicant conversion, not clutter
register.step1_body: Verified agent accounts only. Sign in with Google or create an account with your real email and password to begin your partner journey.
register.business_profile_body: This is where your agency can show credibility, specialisation, and client support style for applicants.
register.bio_placeholder: Tell applicants about your expertise and success rate...
register.review_note: Your profile will be verified before it goes live. This is the exact register → verify → dashboard flow we want to support for revenue growth.
register.toast_required: Please fill in all required fields
register.toast_error: Failed to save your profile. Please try again.
onboarding.h1: The right partner journey, from signup to verified dashboard.
onboarding.subtitle: This is the trusted path for professionals who want to grow with VisaClear: register, verify, then manage applicants from a serious partner workspace.
onboarding.step1_text: Use Google or email/password to create a partner account. This is your secure business entry point.
onboarding.step2_text: Our review team checks your agency details, experience, and trust signals before publishing you live.
onboarding.step3_text: Once approved, your dashboard becomes the place to manage enquiries, follow-ups, and partner visibility.
onboarding.no_profile_body: Register your profile to start the verification process.
onboarding.verified_body: Applicants can find and contact you in the marketplace right now.
onboarding.pending_body: Your partner profile will be reviewed and approved before you go live to applicants.
onboarding.benefit1: Verified partner badge and trust signal
onboarding.benefit3: Dashboard tools for follow-up and business growth
onboarding.why1: Applicants find verified professionals instead of random listings.
onboarding.why2: Agencies collect better leads and reduce wasted time on low-intent enquiries.
onboarding.why3: Premium placement and white-label options create real commercial growth.
onboarding.next_steps_body: Complete your account details, upload your agency information, and prepare your business profile for approval.
onboarding.footer_note: This onboarding flow is intentionally different from the regular applicant dashboard because the agent product is a revenue-facing partner workspace.
why.p5: Your workspace now includes an AI Casework Assistant — ask about your pipeline, draft client follow-ups, and flag stalled cases in seconds.
